title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Replaces all 4 individual useState hooks (repo, path, ref, comment) with react-hook-form for form state management in SaveProvisionedDashboard
1.2: Extracts annotation parsing logic into a helper function for computing form default values
1.3: Replaces the raw getBackendSrv() call with the useUpdateRepositoryFilesMutation hook from the provisioning API
1.4: Publishes a success app event notification upon save mutation success
1.5: Clears dashboard dirty state upon successful save
1.6: Publishes an error app event notification upon save mutation failure
1.7: Wraps the form content in a form element with proper submit handling
1.8: Makes the repository input field read-only

1.9: Renames all 9 connect-prefixed endpoints to standard CRUD naming (getRepositoryExport, createRepositoryExport, getRepositoryFiles, updateRepositoryFiles, createRepositoryFiles, deleteRepositoryFiles, getRepositoryHello, getRepositoryWebhook, createRepositoryWebhook) in endpoints.ts and updates exported hooks
1.10: Removes the unused watchRepositoryList and watchRepository endpoints
1.11: Adds optional ref field to FileOperationArg in types.ts
1.12: Renames commit to ref in GetFileArg in types.ts
1.13: Passes the ref parameter through in all 4 file operation endpoint query definitions (getRepositoryFiles, updateRepositoryFiles, createRepositoryFiles, deleteRepositoryFiles)
1.14: Fixes missing semicolons in dashboard.ts and SaveDashboardDrawer.tsx
2: Documentation Maintainability
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes the unused WatchEvent type import from endpoints.ts
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Retains the raw getBackendSrv().put() call or console.log/alert() feedback in SaveProvisionedDashboard
